scope.reason: Clear global entity-density works gaps for Cohere and Perplexity with source-backed representative works.

works.title: Attention Is All You Need
works.text: Transformer paper co-authored by Aidan Gomez; representative foundation work for Cohere's founder context and language-model lineage.
works.evidenceNote: Aidan Gomez is a Cohere co-founder and co-author of the Transformer paper.

works.title: Aya Expanse: Combining Research Breakthroughs for a New Multilingual Frontier
works.text: Cohere for AI model report already attached to Ivan Zhang; representative multilingual model work for Cohere.
works.evidenceNote: Existing source-backed paper row is promoted into the works lane for Cohere density coverage.

works.title: Distilling a Neural Network Into a Soft Decision Tree
works.text: Interpretable-model paper co-authored by Nick Frosst; representative research work for a Cohere co-founder.
works.evidenceNote: Nick Frosst is a Cohere co-founder and co-author of this paper.

works.title: A Convolutional Neural Network for Modelling Sentences
works.text: Sentence-modelling paper co-authored by Phil Blunsom; representative NLP research work for Cohere's CTO context.
works.evidenceNote: Phil Blunsom is Cohere CTO and co-author of this NLP paper.

works.title: The Illustrated Transformer
works.text: Widely used Transformer explainer by Jay Alammar; representative educational work for Cohere's Engineering Fellow context.
works.evidenceNote: Jay Alammar is a Cohere Engineering Fellow and author of this Transformer explainer.

works.title: Sonar
works.text: Perplexity Sonar model documentation; representative product/API work for Perplexity's AI search platform.
works.evidenceNote: Official Perplexity documentation for Sonar, attached to Perplexity CTO Denis Yarats for organization-level works coverage.

works.title: Sonar Deep Research
works.text: Perplexity Sonar Deep Research model documentation; representative research workflow work for Perplexity's answer engine.
works.evidenceNote: Official Perplexity documentation for Sonar Deep Research, attached to CEO Aravind Srinivas for organization-level works coverage.
